diff --git a/crates/mokumo-shop/src/widgets/handler.rs b/crates/mokumo-shop/src/widgets/handler.rs
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..1111111
--- /dev/null
+++ b/crates/mokumo-shop/src/widgets/handler.rs
@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+pub fn widget_router() -> Router<WidgetState> {
+    Router::new()
+        .route(
+            "/api/widgets",
+            get(list_widgets).post(create_widget),
+        )
+}
